mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user`
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, password, real_name, phone, email, avatar, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status})
